subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down in truth from God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting, unto him who hath attained unto the lights of mystic knowledge when the All-Merciful appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق من لدی الله المهیمن القیوم الی الذی فاز بانوار العرفان اذ اتی الرحمن
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
